# GraphQL TypeScript Template Instructions

This is the instruction file for the GraphQL TypeScript template project. It provides guidelines and best practices for writing code in this project. The instructions apply to all TypeScript and JavaScript files in the project.  The purpose of this project is to provide a production-ready template for building GraphQL APIs with TypeScript and Express for quick prototyping and development.

# Project Coding Guidelines
- Use camelCase for variable names.
- Unit tests are required, and are required to pass before PR
  - Unit tests should focus on core functionality and edge cases.

### Testing
- Use Jest for unit testing and integration testing.
- Write tests for all new features and bug fixes.
- Aim for high test coverage, but prioritize meaningful tests over coverage percentage.
